= Dung Beetle Sequences =
{{IconExampleHeader}}
{{IconExampleRowWithText|Blue Dung Beetle Sequence|blue}}
{{IconExampleRowWithText|Purple Dung Beetle Sequence|purple}}
{{IconExampleRowWithText|Orange Dung Beetle Sequence|orange}}
|}

= Goldfish Sequences =
{{IconExampleHeader}}
{{IconExampleRowWithText|Blue Goldfish Sequence|blue}}
{{IconExampleRowWithText|Purple Goldfish Sequence|purple}}
{{IconExampleRowWithText|Orange Goldfish Sequence|orange}}
|}

= Hamster Sequences =
{{IconExampleHeader}}
{{IconExampleRowWithText|Blue Hamster Sequence|blue}}
{{IconExampleRowWithText|Purple Hamster Sequence|purple}}
{{IconExampleRowWithText|Orange Hamster Sequence|orange}}
|}

= Maneater Sequences =
{{IconExampleHeader}}
{{IconExampleRowWithText|Blue Maneater Sequence|blue}}
{{IconExampleRowWithText|Purple Maneater Sequence|purple}}
{{IconExampleRowWithText|Orange Maneater Sequence|orange}}
|}

= Mantis Sequences =
{{IconExampleHeader}}
{{IconExampleRowWithText|Blue Mantis Sequence|blue}}
{{IconExampleRowWithText|Purple Mantis Sequence|purple}}
{{IconExampleRowWithText|Orange Mantis Sequence|orange}}
|}
= Surf Clam Sequences =
{{IconExampleHeader}}
{{IconExampleRowWithText|Blue Surf Clam Sequence|blue}}
{{IconExampleRowWithText|Purple Surf Clam Sequence|purple}}
{{IconExampleRowWithText|Orange Surf Clam Sequence|orange}}
|}

= Divine Dragon Sequences =
{{IconExampleHeader}}
{{IconExampleRowWithText|Blue Divine Dragon Sequence|blue}}
{{IconExampleRowWithText|Purple Divine Dragon Sequence|purple}}
{{IconExampleRowWithText|Orange Divine Dragon Sequence|orange}}
|}

= Native Sequences =
{{IconExampleHeader}}
{{IconExampleRowWithText|Blue Native Sequence|blue}}
{{IconExampleRowWithText|Purple Native Sequence|purple}}
{{IconExampleRowWithText|Orange Native Sequence|orange}}
|}

= [[Species Map]] =
{{IconExampleHeader}}
{{IconExampleRowWithText|Species Map}}
|}

= Super Species Sequences =
{{IconExampleHeader}}
{{IconExampleRowWithText|Blue Super Species Seq.|blue}}
{{IconExampleRowWithText|Purple Super Species Seq.|purple}}
{{IconExampleRowWithText|Orange Super Species Seq.|orange}}
|}

= Other =
{{IconExampleHeader}}
{{IconExampleRowWithText|Incomplete Species Sequence|green}}
|}

[[Category:Icons]]
